acceptedFindings: Public repo has no tracked SKILL.md, skills/, or .codex/skills/ paths.

Full Ghidra .gpr/.rep project stores and backups remain local/ignored; public repo should track deterministic exports, scripts, ledgers, hashes, markdown/JSON/TSV summaries, and compact proof summaries.
